en.extract:
The white-faced whitestart or white-faced redstart (Myioborus albifacies) is a species of bird in the family Parulidae. It is endemic to humid highland forests in the tepuis of south-western Venezuela. Due to its isolated range, it is very poorly known.

The '''white-faced whitestart''' or '''white-faced redstart''' ('''''Myioborus albifacies''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Parulidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to humid highland forests in the [[tepui]]s of south-western [[Venezuela]]. Due to its isolated range, it is very poorly known.
